raw: {"sender": "Marcus Webb", "product": "Payments", "category": "technical", "urgency": "critical", "summary": "Black Friday checkout failure since 2 AM affecting all payment methods with $4,000 in lost sales. Critical outage requiring immediate resolution."}

parsed.summary: Black Friday checkout failure since 2 AM affecting all payment methods with $4,000 in lost sales. Critical outage requiring immediate resolution.

expected.summary: Payment processing is completely down since 2 AM on Black Friday, affecting all payment methods. Owner estimates $4,000 in lost sales and demands immediate resolution.

raw: {"sender": "Priya Sharma", "product": "Subscriptions", "category": "billing", "urgency": "high", "summary": "Customer on $79 plan charged $299 without warning or explanation, requests immediate refund and explanation."}

parsed.summary: Customer on $79 plan charged $299 without warning or explanation, requests immediate refund and explanation.

expected.summary: Customer was charged $299 instead of $79/month with no explanation. Requesting immediate refund of the $220 difference.

raw: {"sender": "Tom Bradley", "product": "Inventory", "category": "feature_request", "urgency": "low", "summary": "Sarcastic feature request for CSV bulk product import to save time on manual addition."}

parsed.summary: Sarcastic feature request for CSV bulk product import to save time on manual addition.

expected.summary: Customer requests CSV bulk import functionality for products to avoid manual entry one by one.

raw: {"sender": "Sarah Chen", "product": "Analytics", "category": "technical", "urgency": "high", "summary": "Analytics dashboard showing blank white screen for 3 days, preventing monthly sales report generation before end-of-week deadline."}

parsed.summary: Analytics dashboard showing blank white screen for 3 days, preventing monthly sales report generation before end-of-week deadline.

expected.summary: Analytics dashboard shows blank white screen for 3 days across multiple browsers. Customer needs monthly sales report for accountant by end of week.

raw: {"sender": "David Okonkwo", "product": "Subscriptions", "category": "account", "urgency": "low", "summary": "Customer wants to update invoice email address but can't find setting in account."}

parsed.summary: Customer wants to update invoice email address but can't find setting in account.

expected.summary: Customer wants to update billing email address and cannot find the option in settings.

raw: {"sender": "Anna Kowalski", "product": "Shipping", "category": "technical", "urgency": "high", "summary": "Flat-rate shipping option broken for a week, customers being overcharged randomly and owner has had to manually refund $67. Critical issue requiring immediate attention."}

parsed.summary: Flat-rate shipping option broken for a week, customers being overcharged randomly and owner has had to manually refund $67. Critical issue requiring immediate attention.

expected.summary: Flat-rate shipping is being ignored and customers are charged incorrect amounts. Owner has already refunded $67 manually and received complaints from three customers.

raw: {"sender": "Elena Vasquez", "product": "Subscriptions", "category": "feature_request", "urgency": "low", "summary": "Two feature requests: scheduled sales promotions and mobile order management app."}

parsed.summary: Two feature requests: scheduled sales promotions and mobile order management app.

expected.summary: Customer requests two features: scheduled/automated discounts and a mobile app for order management. Both noted as non-urgent quality-of-life improvements.

parsed.summary: Customer requests subscription cancellation and confirmation of no further charges.

expected.summary: Customer wants to cancel subscription due to store closure and requests confirmation of cancellation to avoid future charges.

raw: {"sender": null, "product": "Storefront", "category": "technical", "urgency": "critical", "summary": "Anonymous rant about platform outages every weekend, 3-day support response times, and copy-paste responses that don't address issues. Store down for 6 hours on Saturday during peak shopping time."}

parsed.summary: Anonymous rant about platform outages every weekend, 3-day support response times, and copy-paste responses that don't address issues. Store down for 6 hours on Saturday during peak shopping time.

expected.summary: Customer reports recurring weekend storefront outages, most recently 6 hours of downtime on Saturday during peak hours. Deeply frustrated with slow and unhelpful support responses.

parsed.summary: Customer on Starter plan asks if Growth plan includes unlimited staff accounts before upgrading.

raw: {"sender": "Raj Patel", "product": "Payments", "category": "technical", "urgency": "critical", "summary": "Stripe integration broken for 40 minutes, causing 100% checkout failure during flash sale, resulting in $500+ loss per 10 minutes. Extremely hostile tone but critical financial emergency."}

parsed.summary: Stripe integration broken for 40 minutes, causing 100% checkout failure during flash sale, resulting in $500+ loss per 10 minutes. Extremely hostile tone but critical financial emergency.

expected.summary: Stripe integration failed 40 minutes ago during an active flash sale with 200 concurrent visitors. All checkouts failing, estimated loss of $500 per 10 minutes.

raw: {"sender": "Lucy Hartmann", "product": "Payments", "category": "technical", "urgency": "medium", "summary": "Discount codes recalculating incorrectly when cart quantity changes, potentially exploitable. Reproducible but not causing major issues yet."}

parsed.summary: Discount codes recalculating incorrectly when cart quantity changes, potentially exploitable. Reproducible but not causing major issues yet.

expected.summary: Discount code recalculates incorrectly when cart quantity is changed after applying a percentage discount. Customer has reproduced it consistently and flags potential for exploitation.

raw: {"sender": "Hans Mueller", "product": "Subscriptions", "category": "billing", "urgency": "low", "summary": "Customer requests VAT invoices for last 3 months for quarterly tax filing."}

parsed.summary: Customer requests VAT invoices for last 3 months for quarterly tax filing.

expected.summary: Customer requests VAT invoices for the last 3 months for quarterly tax filing purposes.

parsed.summary: POS and online inventory not syncing since update last Tuesday, causing overselling and order cancellations.

expected.summary: Inventory sync between POS and online store broke after last Tuesday's update. 12 items oversold, requiring order cancellations and damaging customer relationships.

parsed.summary: Anonymous contact form report of image compression destroying color accuracy of handmade ceramic product photos, causing returns.

parsed.summary: Account was cancelled on March 3rd but charged $79 on April 1st. Customer demands immediate refund.

expected.summary: Customer was charged $79 after confirmed account cancellation on March 3rd. Requesting immediate full refund.

raw: {"sender": "Fiona McGrath", "product": "Shipping", "category": "technical", "urgency": "medium", "summary": "Customer has been using ShopFlow for 2 years and provides honest feedback on two ongoing issues: shipping label printing crashing 20% of the time and lack of automatic customer tracking email notifications."}

parsed.summary: Customer has been using ShopFlow for 2 years and provides honest feedback on two ongoing issues: shipping label printing crashing 20% of the time and lack of automatic customer tracking email notifications.

expected.summary: Long-term customer reports shipping label printing crashes ~20% of the time and requests built-in automatic tracking email updates for customers.

raw: {"sender": "Omar Al-Rashid", "product": "Subscriptions", "category": "billing", "urgency": "high", "summary": "Two issues: duplicate subscription charge and broken product search on storefront."}

parsed.summary: Two issues: duplicate subscription charge and broken product search on storefront.

expected.summary: Two separate issues: duplicate $149 charge on the same date, and storefront product search returning no results despite items being in stock. Both flagged as urgent.

raw: {"sender": "Kenji Nakamura", "product": "Inventory", "category": "feature_request", "urgency": "low", "summary": "Sarcastic feature request for out-of-stock item waitlist with automatic email notification when stock is replenished."}

parsed.summary: Sarcastic feature request for out-of-stock item waitlist with automatic email notification when stock is replenished.

expected.summary: Customer suggests native waitlist functionality for out-of-stock items with automatic restock email notifications.

raw: {"sender": "Daniel Ferreira", "product": "Subscriptions", "category": "technical", "urgency": "critical", "summary": "Two-factor authentication setup last week locked account after phone change, leaving store owner completely locked out with no access to orders or data."}

raw: {"sender": "Sophia Andersen", "product": "Storefront", "category": "technical", "urgency": "medium", "summary": "Admin panel order history loading slowly for stores with more than 5,000 orders (15-20 seconds). Also requests bulk order export to Excel."}

raw: {"sender": "Grace Kim", "product": "Storefront", "category": "technical", "urgency": "critical", "summary": "Store appears compromised — customers being redirected to unknown website during checkout. Real customers affected. Possible phishing attack. Immediate action required."}

parsed.summary: Store appears compromised — customers being redirected to unknown website during checkout. Real customers affected. Possible phishing attack. Immediate action required.
